commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=a99d0d0ed8ad5eb5002943db78b6528c6d4444b6)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Slack thread-history preparation to use a single `conversations.replies` call bounded by `latest` when the current message timestamp is known, with tests for bounded and fallback pagination.

PR surface: Source +10, Tests +42. Total +52 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection plus Slack's API contract gives a high-confidence reproduction path: use a thread with more than `limit` earlier replies, pass `currentMessageTs`, and the PR stops after Slack's earliest page before the current message. I did not run a live Slack workspace repro.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] This external draft needs contributor or maintainer follow-up because it has a source-backed correctness blocker and the required real behavior proof is missing.

target.title: Optimize Slack thread history fetch
target.body:
## Summary
- bound Slack thread history fetches to the requested window when the current message timestamp is known
- avoid following reply cursors for long threads during initial thread-context preparation
- keep cursor pagination as a fallback when no current message timestamp is available

## Tests
- env CI=1 OPENCLAW_VITEST_FS_MODULE_CACHE_PATH=/tmp/openclaw-vitest-media-cache node --no-maglev node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-slack.config.ts extensions/slack/src/monitor/media.test.ts --reporter=verbose
- pnpm exec oxlint --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.extensions.json extensions/slack/src/monitor/thread.ts extensions/slack/src/monitor/media.test.ts
- pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 extensions/slack/src/monitor/thread.ts extensions/slack/src/monitor/media.test.ts
- pnpm tsgo:test:extensions

## Notes
- Full extension-slack suite currently fails in this checkout before reaching these changes due unresolved local deps/exports (`@openclaw/proxyline ./dispatcher-brand`, missing `rastermill`).
target.author: simonvanlaak

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
